Video.summary: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!
Video.title: I Want Your Lover!

Video.summary: Cooda's tells his girlfriend that their relationship is over because he's gay and he's running off with a male lover! Then Kathy has always been fond of sharing with best friend Cindy, but that never included Cindy's husband Marquis!
Video.title: You Cheated...So Beat It

Video.summary: Chris is here today to tell his girlfriend, Chrissy, about his sexual fetish. Next we meet Mistress Tara, the dominatrix who caters to Chris' fantasy. We'll watch him pretend to be a dog.
Video.title: My Day As A Dog!

Video.summary: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next When Teresa's boyfriend asked her to have a threesome, she had no idea he was having an ongoing affair!
Video.title: Leave It To Springer!

Video.summary: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.
Video.title: Proposal Do-Over

Video.summary: A woman wants the truth from her sister and boyfriend; a woman must decide between two men; a woman hooks up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: My Stripper Sister Strikes Again

Video.summary: Bre has good reason to think Austin is cheating on her; Michael regrets his actions and hopes his plea can convince Bria to forgive him; Jeremy confesses his feelings for another man's girlfriend through a romantic rap.
Video.title: Sideline Chicks Smackdown

Video.summary: Joanne wants to have a threesome with her friend and the friend's boyfriend; Ron's girlfriend is insanely jealous for a reason; Jazmen confronts her boyfriend and a woman he has been sexting.
Video.title: Girlfriends Get Rolled

Video.summary: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.
Video.title: Men Show No Mercy

Video.summary: Chyna confronts her backstabbing "friend"; Jarod says the stress of being the sole breadwinner for his family has driven him down the path of adultery; Derrick proposes to his ex-girlfriend, who is already married.
Video.title: Proposals Backfire

Video.summary: Cousins Anthony and Brandon have been seeing each other in secret for the past year. Then, Chris is here to tell a secret to his on-again off-again girl Crystal.
Video.title: Gay Cousins In Love

Video.summary: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.
Video.title: Lying Loves Confess

Video.summary: Nikki finally has proof of Bryan’s trysts with Melissa! Lil Ron slept with two cousins Felisha and Simone. Drew has admitted to cheating 15 times, but his latest hookup with neighbor Shaina could be his last.
Video.title: More Mistress Mayhem

Video.summary: Brady proposes to his ex-girlfriend, then she learns he cheated with her friend; Dillon feels he has to come clean about an advance he made toward his fiancee's friend.
Video.title: It Was a 1 Night Smash

Video.summary: Tashe wants the truth about her boyfriend and another woman; Frank has a revelation that will turn his girlfriend's world upside down; Passion wonders if she should give her boyfriend a threesome.
Video.title: Turned Down for ... What?!

Video.summary: Briget wants the rumors about her boyfriend's cheating to stop; Samantha says her best friend has turned into her worst enemy; Moniqua wants to get her ex-boyfriend's new baby-mama out of the picture.
Video.title: Fight Fest

Video.summary: Nikki, Courtney, and Samantha all want to have a three-way lesbian marriage! Then Jonathan's engaged to two different women, but after they learn they're both being playing, he's going to have to make a choice.
Video.title: Brawlin' Brides!

Video.summary: Paige admits to sleeping with her friend's boyfriend; Alex confesses to cheating with two women; Kaylynn decides to get even with her friend.
Video.title: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Image.alt: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Video.summary: Nick is here to tell his soon to be wife Ashley that he's been cheating on her with two different women! Plus, Shea is here and worried sick that her husband Adam may have had a little too much fun on a recent trip the couple took together.
Video.title: Stripper Spring Fling

Video.summary: Andre and Champaign’s online relationship took off, but she must admit that she’s actually a he! Shane will marry Michelle, but he’s been fulfilling his fantasy with a Dominatrix! Brandy’s wild job now involves her sister’s boyfriend!
Video.title: Trick or Treat

Video.summary: Percy must choose between his baby-mama and his other woman; Mary learns that her fiance has messed around with her friend; Casey wonders whether she should get back together with a man who constantly lies.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Deception

Video.summary: Freddie insists he wants to be with his wife and his days of hooking up with his ex-girlfriend are over; Carleeta devises a scheme she thinks will strengthen her bond with her sister; Shi's friend and boyfriend got to know each other better.
Video.title: Busted by Your Bestie

Video.summary: Scotty says he feels like his girlfriend has a GPS on him 24/7; Giovanni blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; Winona wants to spice things up in the bedroom.
Video.title: Mistresses Reeled In

Video.summary: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. So she got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!
Video.title: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Image.alt: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Video.summary: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a transsexual. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.
Video.title: Sizzling Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Missy and Kevin dated online, but he moved on to Whitney. Missy won’t stop chasing him! Rebecca won’t let Tony get away with cheating on her. His friends say she’s lying! Stacy’s best friend Amanda crashed with her and slept with her man Bryan!
Video.title: You Can't Run From Me!

Video.summary: Nick's girlfriend finds out why he spends so much time with their neighbor; Osha's boyfriend scored with his female friend; Brandi resents her boyfriend's reckless behavior after all of the sacrifices she has made to keep their relationship.
Video.title: Clingy Chicks

Video.summary: Friends who strip together stay together, according to Chrissy and Jenny. But will their mothers feel the same? Then D'earl reveals far more than just secrets, and his wife is about to give him a run for his money maker.
Video.title: A Stripper's Tale

Video.summary: Jessica wants to break up with her rapper boyfriend, but he proposes marriage; Carly reveals her true feelings for her close friend; Nicole, who has been with her boyfriend for five years, wants to know why he hasn't divorced his wife yet.
Video.title: Hunting for a Man

Video.summary: Sony wants to know if Mobetta has been unfaithful.
Video.title: Rappers Battle... For Love

Video.summary: A man finds out his wife is having sex with their son-in-law; a man cheats with one of his girlfriend's best friends; a man suspects his girlfriend is cheating with his friend.
Video.title: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Image.alt: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Video.summary: D'Handsome wants to call off his engagement; Jeff wants a threesome; Jamie's boyfriend hooked up with another woman.
Video.title: Smothered ... With Sauce

Video.summary: Geeky Ben finally got with his dream girl and now wants to leave his girlfriend Brittany. Katie ended up sleeping with best friend Julie’s man on a camping trip, but he’s got his own secret. Tina took over her friend Leanne’s house and husband!
Video.title: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Image.alt: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
